info.title: Small C# exercises
info.description: Small exercises to get you used to reading and writing C# code. Inspired by Rustlings

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Sharplings is a collection of small exercises to get you used to reading and writing C# code. Inspired by Rustlings

options.name: --manual-run
options.description: Manually run the current exercise using `r` in the watch mode. Only use this if Sharplings fails to detect exercise file changes [default: False]

options.name: --output
options.description: The name of the directory where the exercises will be initialized. Default is 'Sharplings'

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run a single exercise. Runs the next pending exercise if the exercise name is not specified

commands.name: check-all
commands.description: Check all the exercises, marking them as done or pending accordingly

commands.name: hint
commands.description: Show a hint. Shows the hint of the next pending exercise if the exercise name is not specified

commands.name: new
commands.description: Create a new project for community exercises

options.name: --no_git
options.description: Don't try to initialize a Git repository in the project directory [default: False]

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: The path to create the project in

options.name: --require_solutions
options.description: Require that every exercise has a solution [default: False]
